sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n99417" key="sunapoklu/zw" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">συναπο-κλύζω</orth>, <sense id="n99417.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">wash away with</tr_> or <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">at once</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0671.tlg001:1" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Philum.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">Ven.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
